untranslatable_reason: AADB pattern recognition requires specific chart pattern detection (low at right bottom, formation structure) which cannot be expressed using only the allowed technical indicators. The pattern itself is a visual/structural formation that needs custom pattern-matching logic not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Signal encodes a 30% profit target (achievable by only 32% of patterns) and acknowledges high failure rate (68%). Entry modeled as price rise from a local low. Exit set to 30% return target. Context-dependent direction interpreted as LONG breakout. Pattern detection itself is untranslatable with standard indicators.
